creator: noway@nohow.demon.co.uk
text:
On Wed, 22 Aug 2001, Rodolfo A. Sanchez Guzman wrote:

[Snip]
> >Description:
> Update port of JavaMail 1.1 API to JavaMail 1.2 API

The following is an update to the port expressed as a diff.

diff -ruN /usr/ports/java/javamail/Makefile javamail/Makefile
--- /usr/ports/java/javamail/Makefile	Tue Apr 25 16:22:49 2000
+++ javamail/Makefile	Sun Sep  2 12:27:20 2001
@@ -6,9 +6,9 @@
 #

 PORTNAME=	javamail
-PORTVERSION=	1.1.3
+PORTVERSION=	1.2
 CATEGORIES=	java
-DISTNAME=	${PORTNAME}${PORTVERSION:S/./_/g}
+DISTNAME=	${PORTNAME}-${PORTVERSION:S/./_/g}
 EXTRACT_SUFX=	.zip

 MAINTAINER=	noway@nohow.demon.co.uk
@@ -33,7 +33,7 @@
 do-install:
 	@cd ${WRKSRC}; \
 		${MKDIR} ${PREFIX}/share/java/classes/; \
-		${CP} ${WRKSRC}/mail.jar ${PREFIX}/share/java/classes/; \
+		${CP} ${WRKSRC}/*.jar ${PREFIX}/share/java/classes/; \
 		${MKDIR} ${PREFIX}/share/java/${PKGNAME}/; \
 		${CP} CHANGES.txt LICENSE.txt NOTES.txt README.txt ${PREFIX}/share/java/${PKGNAME}/; \
 		${CP} -R demo ${PREFIX}/share/java/${PKGNAME}/; \
diff -ruN /usr/ports/java/javamail/distinfo javamail/distinfo
--- /usr/ports/java/javamail/distinfo	Tue Apr 25 16:22:50 2000
+++ javamail/distinfo	Sun Sep  2 12:24:30 2001
@@ -1 +1 @@
-MD5 (javamail1_1_3.zip) = 0838da6939ca02be6268a045bc17df76
+MD5 (javamail-1_2.zip) = bdd1ae1daee83397bf832caa0adc83ba
diff -ruN /usr/ports/java/javamail/pkg-plist javamail/pkg-plist
--- /usr/ports/java/javamail/pkg-plist	Tue Apr 25 16:22:51 2000
+++ javamail/pkg-plist	Sun Sep  2 12:37:07 2001
